title: Junior Frontend Developer at Accenture India

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Accenture India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Accenture India in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Accenture India:
Accenture India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accenture India!
